query: SELECT tiabPlanId, planName, planType, baseCharge, dataAllowanceGb FROM tiab_plans WHERE planName LIKE '%Data Only 12%' OR planName LIKE '%Pool 60%' OR planName LIKE '%Retail%' OR planName LIKE '%ST Data%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT tiabPlanId, planName, planType, baseCharge, dataAllowanceGb FROM tiab_plans WHERE planName LIKE '%Data Only 12%' OR planName LIKE '%Pool 60%' OR planName LIKE '%Retail%' OR planName LIKE '%ST Data%' LIMIT 10;
